title: Fragrant Fermented Slovakian Sweet Potatoes Bake
description: A sour, aerated Slovakian weeknight dish featuring slow-cooked sweet potatoes, perfect for a dinner or dessert.
instructions: Boil sweet potatoes in a large pot of salted water until tender, about 15 minutes.
Drain and mash the sweet potatoes in a large bowl.
In a small bowl, mix together flour, caraway seeds, and salt. Add to the mashed sweet potatoes and mix well.
Add sour cream, sugar, and fermented cabbage juice to the sweet potato mixture and mix until combined.
Place the banana leaves in a round baking dish, overlapping them slightly to create a seal.
Spoon the sweet potato mixture into the center of the banana leaves, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Place the round baking dish in a larger oven-safe baking dish and add hot water to come halfway up the sides of the round dish.
Bake for 45 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the sweet potatoes are set.
Remove from oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
